summary.headline: Core Portfolio subscriptions remain active. Vapi remains the only provisional cancellation gate; Apify and Vercel have fresh activity, while Hunter.io and OpenRouter need baseline billing checks.
nextReviewFocus: Check Vapi dashboard call history and active billing.
Check Pinecone and OpenRouter billing/API usage against RAG and model-routing plans.
Check Hunter.io billing/API usage from lead workflows.
Verify whether production uses Resend or Gmail/n8n.

vendors.name: Vapi
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in Gmail; dashboard billing still needs verification.
vendors.usageSignal: Voice code, env, and webhook references remain, but no operational usage signal was confirmed across multiple audit sessions.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Voice/audit experience risk if production voice UX is enabled.
vendors.recommendation: Provisional cancellation candidate only if dashboard confirms an active paid plan and production voice UX is not active.
vendors.nextAction: Check Vapi dashboard call history and billing; approval phrase would be Cancel Vapi for Portfolio.

vendors.name: BuiltWith
vendors.billingSignal: Receipts found on 2026-04-10 in the prior billing pass.
vendors.usageSignal: No confirmed non-empty production tech-stack enrichment rows in this run; protected as an outreach-ramp watch item.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Tech-stack lookup/enrichment supports lead prep, implementation strategy, and feasibility assessment.
vendors.recommendation: Keep active during outreach ramp; reassess after more leads, audits, implementation strategies, proposals, and client outcomes.
vendors.nextAction: Compare sales-flow outcomes where BuiltWith enrichment helped versus leads where it did not.

vendors.name: Fireflies.ai
vendors.billingSignal: Refund found on 2026-03-20; Vambah confirmed canceled on 2026-05-01.
vendors.usageSignal: No post-May-01 Slack activity found; prior April recap evidence overlapped with Read.ai.
vendors.portfolioDependency: No direct Portfolio repo integration found in the latest audit.
vendors.recommendation: Keep out of active cancellation queue unless new paid-plan evidence appears.
vendors.nextAction: No action unless a new Fireflies receipt or paid-plan signal appears.

vendors.name: Vercel
vendors.billingSignal: Billing owner still needs documentation; CLI access is authenticated under vsillahs-projects.
vendors.usageSignal: Vercel CLI showed ready production and preview deployments for portfolio and portfolio-staging on 2026-05-03.
vendors.recommendation: Keep; operationally active, but dashboard/account ownership still needs documentation.
vendors.nextAction: Document the actual hosting account/project and billing owner.

vendors.name: Printful
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in Gmail; Printful is likely usage/order based rather than a fixed subscription.
vendors.usageSignal: Fulfillment code, product variants, and one historical Printful-linked order exist; printful_sync_log remains empty across sessions.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Store fulfillment and merchandise sync risk.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate dashboard order history before any deprecation decision.
vendors.nextAction: Check Printful dashboard/store order history and whether merchandise remains active.

vendors.name: Resend
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in Gmail.
vendors.usageSignal: Optional transactional provider remains in code, but latest production email row used n8n transport.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Transactional email delivery risk if production is configured to use Resend.
vendors.recommendation: Verify production env and billing before keeping as a paid dependency or removing.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm whether production uses Resend or Gmail/n8n as the real outbound channel.

vendors.name: Pinecone
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in Gmail.
vendors.usageSignal: n8n RAG query/ingest references remain active while production local RAG documents are also populated.
vendors.recommendation: Check billing/API usage and compare with Supabase/local RAG replacement path.
vendors.nextAction: Verify Pinecone usage and whether the current RAG path still depends on it.

vendors.name: Apify
vendors.billingSignal: Gmail found a payment-success invoice on 2026-05-03 for $39.
vendors.usageSignal: n8n exports include Apify nodes and recent n8n Cloud executions continue.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Lead sourcing, scraping, and actor-monitor automation.
vendors.recommendation: Keep; continue cadence and spend review separately from cancellation.
vendors.nextAction: Review actor cadence and spend before the next renewal window.

vendors.name: Hunter.io
vendors.billingSignal: No billing receipt was confirmed in this run.
vendors.usageSignal: HUNTER_API_KEY, lead-source references, and n8n Hunter node-swap docs are present.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Lead discovery and email enrichment workflow risk.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing/API usage; this is a new baseline, not a cancellation candidate.
vendors.nextAction: Check Hunter.io dashboard usage and whether paid quota is active.

vendors.name: OpenRouter
vendors.billingSignal: No billing receipt was confirmed in this run.
vendors.usageSignal: OPENROUTER_API_KEY, media bakeoff references, and Gmail draft workflow docs are present.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Specialist model-routing path for image/media and draft-reply workflows.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing/API usage; keep as a specialist until bakeoff evidence says otherwise.
vendors.nextAction: Check OpenRouter usage and decide whether it is active, sandbox-only, or replaceable.

vendors.name: ElevenLabs
vendors.billingSignal: Receipts found through 2026-04-19 in the prior billing pass.
vendors.usageSignal: Social/audio workflow references remain; no new direct ElevenLabs run was confirmed today.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Audio generation for social/video content campaigns.
vendors.recommendation: Watch through the next social content cycle before renewal review.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm next campaign audio usage before renewing or downgrading.
